scope: Repair the automation aggregate check failure seen in recent logs by making the automation closeout check resilient when TypeScript tooling is not installed locally.
log_findings: State DB shows the only SeniorProjectApp1.0 thread inside the past half hour was the manual automation audit thread; scheduled Senior Capstone automation worktrees last updated earlier at 07:17 PT.
The recent project thread ended with aggregate run-npm-script.ps1 check reaching TypeScript and failing because this shell has no npm, node_modules, or tsc.cmd.

The Codex log database did not show additional Senior Capstone scheduled failures inside the same half-hour window; the freshest automation worktrees in that window were Curriculum runs, not this repo.
script_changes: Aggregate check now treats a missing TypeScript compiler as an optional warning after alpha syntax, alpha contract, automation contract, site-options, and Node tests pass.
Direct typecheck remains strict and still exits nonzero when npm/node_modules/tsc.cmd or TSC_CMD is unavailable.
The strict missing-compiler path now prints one concise actionable line instead of a PowerShell throw stack.
validation: powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\run-npm-script.ps1 check passed with 7 Node tests and a nonfatal optional TypeScript warning.
powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\run-npm-script.ps1 typecheck failed intentionally with the concise compiler-missing message.

powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\run-npm-script.ps1 verify:functionality-ux-automation:live passed for configured automation entries and 2 support automations.
known_limits: Strict TypeScript validation still requires npm install, node_modules, or TSC_CMD; aggregate automation closeout no longer fails solely because the unattended shell lacks that optional local tool.

automation_efficiency.notes: This removes the repeated missing-compiler failure from the aggregate automation closeout path while preserving a strict typecheck command for environments with installed dependencies.

self_improvement: Patched the project wrapper, verified the failed aggregate path, and logged the repair so future scheduled runs can use the same non-interactive command safely.
